# Installation

## Requirements

- Python 3.10 or higher
- PyTorch 2.3 or higher

## Install from source

Clone the repository and install in editable mode:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/mllam/neural-lam.git
cd neural-lam
pip install -e ".[dev]"
```

## Verify installation
```python
import neural_lam
print("neural-lam installed successfully")
```
